backend.changelog: Generate now remembers, per cached CAD file, which platform version it last downloaded - so repeat runs skip re-downloading drawings and parts that are already current, and outdated locally-cached assemblies are refreshed automatically, eliminating the blocking 'Unable to load revision A.1 - will use B.1' SolidWorks dialogs caused by stale local copies.

cadBridge.changelog: Generate is significantly faster when one drawing is shared by many BOM items - the shared drawing is rendered once per run and its PDF/DXF outputs are reused for the other items (multi-item drawing phases drop from ~35 to ~10 minutes). The blocking SolidWorks revision-conflict dialog ('Unable to load revision ... already open in the session') is now dismissed automatically during generation - every dismissal is logged and shown in the output messages, so unattended runs no longer stall. Includes 1.8.76 (foreign dirty assemblies closed before standalone export).
